Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena To Jose Gallardo Noriega; Request For Sanctions Of $1,500.00
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENA TO JOSE GALLARDO NORIEGA; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS OF $1,500.00

Appearances:
Chet Reyen of the Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley (650.989.5400, creyen@clappmoroney.com) for defendants City of San Francisco and County of San Francisco;
Joshua Haffner of Haffner Law PC (213.514.5681, jhh@haffnerlawyers.com) appearing via Zoom for plaintiffs.

This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs Jose Padilla et al.'s motion to compel the deposition of Jose Gallardo Noriega is granted. The deposition shall occur within three weeks unless the parties agree otherwise. The court does not award sanctions in this case. The meet and confer correspondence reflects that Noriega offered dates in late May; the court finds substantial justification. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR 13293 (415.517.5439, calendar-la@veritext.com) (301/CVA)
